outliers.desc: The last 10k was violently humbling but WE DID IT!!!! First marathon complete🎉🎉 sooo happy!! #marathon #running #runwithme #runningmotivation #marathonrunning
Although I am actually a fan of a Saturday long run too…. I dabble in both #marathontraining #running
Survived another long run yayyy!!! My marathon is 3 weeks tomorrow omgggg how did that happen?!😳 #marathontraining #longrun #running #runwithme #runtok #runningmotivation #marathon
Low-key felt like i was sprinting the entire time but we did ittt!!! #running #5k #runningmotivation #runwithme
Literally can never stop eating the day after a long run hahaha !! #whatieatinaday #wieiad #running #fitness #marathontraining #mealinspo
Never in my life did i think i would be using “14km” and “easy run” in the same sentence but here we are!!😂 #marathontraining #running #runwithme #runtok #runningmotivation #marathon
This was painful lol but kind of fun to do some shorter intervals #running #runningmotivation #intervalrun

So so happy to be back running again after > 6 weeks! I have a long way to go and have to be patient and build up slowly, but I’m honestly just so grateful to be running pain free🫶🫶 #running #runningmotivation #injuredrunner #stressfracture
The first one is all I really want lol - any of the others would be a lovely bonus though🤩 #runninggoals #running #runningmotivation
Was NOT expecting this I can’t lie!!! Wanted this for ages!! Although shame it wasn’t a parkrun lol…is strava official?! #running #runwithme #runningmotivation #5k
It’s been an eventful year (well, 6 months lol). And after all that I am still very much in love with running?!?! Bring on 2024🫶🫶 #running #runningjourney #marathon #runningmotivation

First long run from my half marathon plan!! Never tried mixing up my pace in long runs before but it was actually fun and made the run go by much faster - would recommend!!! Although the 5k did kill me off 😭 #running #halfmarathontraining #runningmotivation #longrun #runwithme

Please fuel your body guys❤️❤️Undereating is so dangerous for your bone health (and health in general) and I wish I knew this sooner!! Being light, having visible abs etc. will NOT make you faster if you’re undereating; it will literally sabotage your performance and health.   #running
Okay why are 800s actual torture lol. Another speed session done though🎉 #running #runningmotivation
Lil what i eat in a day while getting back to running💓Reminder that you need to fuel your body in order to be fast!! #running #whatieatinaday
Consistency is a wonderful thing🤩🤩also let me tell you the long runs feel so much easier this time around !!! #running #marathontraining #runningprogress
If you’ve seen this already, no you haven’t lol #whatieatinaday #running
Stunning stunning day (minus the library lol). Alpaca walking was actually the best thing ever😭😍 #dayinmylife #running #uni #runningmotivation

Feels so good to be back running💓💓😭😭sub 20 5k I am coming for you soon !!! Also I made a lil running insta @mimijrunning gonna try and use it to document my next marathon training block yayyy #running #parkrun #injuredrunner #runwithme #runningmotivation #5k

Did my longest run ever today!! Wish i could say i enjoyed it but the heat made it TOUGH🥵proud of myself for getting through it though!! #runwithme #longrun #marathontraining #runtok #running #runningmotivation
